title: Subramaniya Swamy Temple, Tiruttani
tagline: Subramaniya Swamy Temple, Tiruttani — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Subramaniya Swamy Temple, Tiruttani, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Subramaniya Swamy Temple is a Hindu temple located on a hillock in Tiruttani, Tiruvallur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Subramaniya Swamy Temple is a Hindu temple located on a hillock in Tiruttani, Tiruvallur district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is dedicated to Murugan, and is one of the six abodes of Murugan (Arupadaiveedu). As per Hindu mythology, Murugan came to Tiruttani after killing Surapadman to subside his anger. He also married Valli at the location.

topPlaces.name: Tiruttani
topPlaces.description: Tiruttani is a historic temple town situated in the Tiruvallur district and serves as a suburb of Chennai within the Chennai Metropolitan Area in the southern Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The town is famous for the Tiruttani Murugan Temple, an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Kartikeya, also known as Murugan, the Hindu god of war.

topPlaces.name: Pattabiramapuram
topPlaces.description: Pattabiramapuram is a town in Thiruvallur District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is situated 2.9 km east of Tiruttani, on the NH 205 (Chennai-Anantpur national highway).

topPlaces.name: Santhanagopalapuram
topPlaces.description: Santhanagopalaurma is a small village in Tiruttani Taluk of Thiruvallur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu (PIN 631 201). It is 10 kilometers north-east of Tiruttani and 2 kilometers from Andhra Pradhesh border.

topPlaces.name: Guruvarajapet
topPlaces.description: Guruvarajapet is a census town located in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

items.note: Tiruttani is a historic temple town situated in the Tiruvallur district and serves as a suburb of Chennai within the Chennai Metropolitan Area in the southern Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The town is famous for the Tiruttani Murugan Temple, an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to Kartikeya, also known as Murugan, the Hindu god of war.
Pattabiramapuram is a town in Thiruvallur District in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is situated 2.9 km east of Tiruttani, on the NH 205 (Chennai-Anantpur national highway).

Santhanagopalaurma is a small village in Tiruttani Taluk of Thiruvallur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu (PIN 631 201). It is 10 kilometers north-east of Tiruttani and 2 kilometers from Andhra Pradhesh border.
Guruvarajapet is a census town located in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Subramaniya Swamy Temple, Tiruttani?
faq.a: The best time to visit Subramaniya Swamy Temple, Tiruttani is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Subramaniya Swamy Temple, Tiruttani?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tirupati Airport (52 km) and the nearest railway station is Tirupati Railway Station (55 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Subramaniya Swamy Temple, Tiruttani?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Subramaniya Swamy Temple, Tiruttani at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Subramaniya Swamy Temple, Tiruttani?
faq.a: Stays in Subramaniya Swamy Temple, Tiruttani start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Subramaniya Swamy Temple, Tiruttani?
faq.a: The top attractions are Tiruttani, Pattabiramapuram, Santhanagopalapuram, Guruvarajapet.
